translation_quality.summary: Translation has multiple MT-style artifacts and phrasing issues. 'Im bặc' for 'im dumb' is raw/unnatural. 'Người lớn sao chép từ Tom Riddle, phía tối' is awkward phrasing. 'Giáo sư Quirrell đã bảo vệ phía ngược lại' appears to misread the source.

findings.issue: 'Im bặc' is not standard Vietnamese. Should be 'im lặng' or 'im đi'. The 'bặc' transliteration of 'dumb' is MT-style artifact.
findings.suggested_fix: Change to 'im lặng' or 'im đi' depending on context.

findings.description: Awkward phrasing around 'copied from Tom Riddle'
findings.source_excerpt: adults copied from Tom Riddle, the Dark side
findings.target_excerpt: người lớn sao chép từ Tom Riddle, 'phía tối'
findings.issue: Phrasing is unnatural. The quote structure and 'phía tối' feels off. Should be restructured for natural Vietnamese.
findings.suggested_fix: Consider 'người lớn sao chép từ Tom Riddle, phía bên kia — phía tối' or similar natural construction.

findings.source_excerpt: Professor Quirrell had been defending the opposite side
findings.target_excerpt: Giáo sư Quirrell đã bảo vệ phía ngược lại
findings.issue: 'Bảo vệ phía ngược lại' could be read as 'defended the opposite position' which may be the intended meaning but phrasing is ambiguous. Verify source intent.
findings.suggested_fix: Confirm source reading; if meaning is ' Quirrell was on the opposing side', restructure to 'Giáo sư Quirrell đã ở phía đối diện' or clarify.

notes: Chapter 126 has more translation quality issues than the others — MT artifacts and awkward phrasing suggest more mechanical translation in places. Needs closer review before shipping.
